title: GoDaddy Inc. to Present at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference
text: TEMPE, Ariz., March 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY), the company that empowers everyday entrepreneurs, today announced that Aman Bhutani, GoDaddy Chief Executive Officer, and Mark McCaffrey, GoDaddy Chief Financial Officer, will present at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco on Monday, March 7, 2022, at 10:20 a.m.
